text: Flash flooding reported near downtown Guelph, roads closed, people stranded on rooftops waiting for rescue.
Wildfire smoke is getting worse near Kelowna, visibility low. AQI over 400. People told to stay indoors.
BREAKING: 7.1 magnitude earthquake hits central Turkey. Multiple buildings collapsed in Malatya. Rescue teams mobilizing. Casualties feared.
Category 4 hurricane approaching Barbados. Winds 150mph. All residents urged to seek shelter immediately. Landfall in 6 hours.
Small tremor felt in San Francisco Bay Area. USGS reports M3.2. No damage reported. Shaking lasted about 5 seconds.
Tornado touched down in Moore, Oklahoma. Multiple structures damaged. Power out for 15,000 homes. Second funnel spotted by storm chasers.
URGENT: Dam breach reported near Brumadinho. Downstream villages being evacuated. Military deployed. Massive mudslide potential.
Flooding in downtown Houston is insane. Water up to car roofs on I-45. DO NOT drive. Coast Guard launching boats for rescues.
Bushfire out of control in New South Wales. 50,000 hectares burned. 12 homes destroyed. RFS crews exhausted. Air tankers from Victoria deployed.
Earthquake M5.4 off coast of Japan. Tsunami advisory for Miyagi Prefecture. Coastal residents told to move to higher ground.
River Rhine flooding in Cologne. Water levels 8m above normal. Old town evacuated. Sandbag operations underway across the city.
Heatwave emergency in Phoenix. 5th consecutive day above 115F. Hospitals overwhelmed with heat stroke patients. Cooling centers at max capacity.
Landslide in Freetown Sierra Leone. Heavy rains caused hillside collapse. At least 50 homes buried. Rescue hampered by continued rain.
Minor flooding in Venice. Acqua alta reaching 110cm. St. Mark's Square under water. MOSE barriers partially activated.
Earthquake swarm near Reykjavik. 200+ tremors in 24 hours. Largest M4.8. Volcanic eruption risk elevated. Civil protection on alert.
Tropical storm making landfall in the Philippines. Heavy rain and flooding in Leyte province. 10,000 people in evacuation centers.
CRITICAL: Chemical plant explosion in Tianjin port area. Massive fireball visible for miles. Emergency services overwhelmed. Shelter in place order issued.
Flooding continues in Bangladesh. Sylhet district 80% underwater. 500,000 displaced. Food and medicine critically low. International aid needed.
Dust storm reducing visibility to zero in Riyadh. Highway pileups reported. Schools closed. Stay indoors advisory in effect.
M6.2 earthquake rocks Haiti. Port-au-Prince buildings damaged. Hospitals report incoming casualties. UN coordinating emergency response.
Volcanic eruption at Mount Etna. Lava flow heading toward Catania suburbs. Airport closed. Ash cloud reaching 10km altitude.
Blizzard conditions in Chicago. O'Hare airport closed. Wind chill -40F. Frostbite risk in minutes. Warming centers open citywide.
Ice storm knocking down power lines across Tennessee. 200,000 without electricity. Roads coated in ice. National Guard activated.
Glacial lake outburst flood in Nepal. Rapid water surge destroying bridges in Solukhumbu. Trekkers stranded near Everest base camp.
Flash floods in Jeddah. Cars floating through streets. Shopping malls flooded. Airport runways underwater. All flights cancelled.
Wildfire approaching Lake Tahoe from the south. Jumping containment lines. Mandatory evacuation for South Lake Tahoe. 30,000 residents fleeing.
Derecho storm ripping through Iowa. 100mph straight-line winds. Grain silos toppled. Entire corn crop flattened. State of emergency declared.
M7.8 earthquake strikes near Kathmandu. Major structural collapse. Multiple hospitals damaged. International search and rescue requested.
Record rainfall in Seoul. Han River at highest level in 50 years. Subways flooded. Government activating all emergency shelters.
Severe thunderstorm with golf-ball sized hail hitting Dallas-Fort Worth. Thousands of cars damaged. DFW airport closed. Multiple injuries.
Forest fire near Antalya spreading toward resort areas. Tourists being relocated. 3 hotels evacuated. Turkish firefighters requesting international aid.
Mudslide blocks highway near Bogota. Several vehicles trapped. Rain continues. Emergency crews working to clear debris.
Flooding in Nairobi's Mathare slum. Homes washed away overnight. At least 20 missing. Red Cross setting up emergency shelters.
Peat fires burning underground in Sumatra. Surface fires spreading to plantations. Thick haze covering Singapore. Air quality unhealthy.
Cyclone aftermath in Mozambique. Beira 90% destroyed. Cholera outbreak confirmed. WHO deploying medical teams. Death toll rising.
Heavy snowfall isolating villages in northern Pakistan. Avalanche risk extreme. Army helicopters grounded by weather. Food supplies running low.
Storm surge flooding coastal areas of Vietnam. Da Nang beachfront under 1.5m water. Hotels evacuated. Typhoon center 200km offshore.
Drought emergency declared in Cape Town. Day Zero approaching. Residents limited to 50 liters per day. Agriculture sector devastated.
Heavy rains causing sewage overflow in London. Thames Barrier closed. Underground stations flooded. Commuters stranded across the city.
Fire raging through Amazon rainforest near Manaus. Satellite shows 200km smoke plume. Indigenous communities at risk.
Flooding in Jakarta after overnight downpour. Major intersections impassable. Governor declares state of emergency. Schools and offices closed.
Strong earthquake felt in Mexico City. Things falling off shelves. Buildings swaying 30+ seconds. People running outside in panic.
Wildfire smoke advisory for Portland Oregon. AQI over 300. N95 masks recommended. Outdoor activities suspended. Schools switching to remote.
Small brush fire near residential area in San Diego. 2 acres, 50% contained. One home with minor damage. No injuries.
Aftershock panic in Malatya Turkey. People refusing to enter buildings. Tent cities growing. Temperature dropping to -5C tonight. Need heaters and blankets.
River levels rising dangerously in Prague. Vltava expected to crest tomorrow. Flood barriers up along Old Town. Museums moving collections upstairs.
Avalanche in Swiss Alps near Zermatt. Ski resort evacuated. 4 hikers missing. Helicopter rescue delayed by weather. Search dogs deployed.
Tropical depression forming in Gulf of Mexico. Could strengthen to hurricane by Thursday. Gulf coast states beginning preparations.
Hailstorm devastating crops in Punjab India. Farmers report total loss of wheat harvest. Grapefruit-sized hail damaging roofs and vehicles.
UPDATE: Houston flooding death toll rises to 4. Coast Guard rooftop rescues ongoing. NRG Center shelter reaching capacity. Donations needed.
Grass fire in Napa Valley wine country. Vineyards threatened. Mandatory evacuation for Calistoga. Smoke advisory for entire Bay Area.
Tsunami warning cancelled for Chile after M6.8 offshore quake. Initial scare caused evacuations in Valparaiso. All clear. No casualties.
Winter storm dropping 60cm of snow in Montreal. 200 car accidents today. Power outages affecting 80,000 homes. Metro delays across all lines.
Moderate earthquake M4.5 near Athens Greece. Minor damage to older buildings. No casualties. Schools evacuated as precaution.
Flooding receding in Bangkok after 3 days. Cleanup beginning. Damage assessment underway. Boil water advisory for 6 districts.
Lightning-sparked fire in Yosemite National Park. 500 acres burned. Park partially closed. Campers evacuated from Glacier Point.
Cyclone Amphan aftermath: Kolkata still without power 48 hours later. Trees blocking roads. Clean water shortage. Aid convoys stuck.
Wildfire in Sardinia destroys 20,000 hectares. EU activating Civil Protection Mechanism. Water bombers from France and Spain arriving.
Moderate earthquake felt across Los Angeles. M4.2 centered near Pasadena. Cracked walls reported. Caltech monitoring for aftershocks.
Flash flood warning for Mumbai. Monsoon rains exceeding 200mm in 6 hours. Local trains suspended. Avoid low-lying areas.
